name: Prototype pollution via CLI argv deep-merge (CVE-2021-44906 family)
pattern_description: Deep-merge of CLI argument paths into an object without guarding against `__proto__`, `prototype`, `constructor` keys. The diff REMOVES the explicit denylist of those keys, re-introducing prototype pollution. The introduced `setDeep` walks `path` array including poisoned segments.
notes: This pattern was the root cause of multiple high-profile prototype-pollution disclosures in 2021-2022 across CLI/option parsers (minimist, yargs-parser, loader-utils, set-value). The diff explicitly removes the denylist that earlier patches added — a regression style commonly seen during refactors.
